items.title: iptv-org/iptv
items.description: Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world
items.author: iptv-org
items.summary_zh: 这个项目收集了全球各地公开可用的IPTV频道，让你能轻松观看来自世界各国的电视节目。对于热爱探索不同文化节目或身处海外想收看家乡频道的人来说，它提供了一个免费且便捷的聚合入口，无需繁琐的订阅流程。重要的是，它完全开源并由社区维护，频道列表会持续更新，有效解决了寻找稳定免费IPTV源的常见痛点。
items.summary_en: iptv-org/iptv is a community-maintained collection of freely available IPTV channels from around the world. It aggregates thousands of live TV streams into a single, structured playlist, making it easy to explore international TV content without expensive subscriptions. This open-source project solves the headache of finding reliable, free IPTV sources by keeping the list constantly updated. Anyone interested in global TV content—from expats to cord-cutters—can benefit by simply loading the playlist into any compatible player.

items.title: github/spec-kit
items.description: 💫 Toolkit to help you get started with Spec-Driven Development
items.author: github
items.summary_zh: Spec-Kit 是一个帮助开发者快速入门规范驱动开发的开源工具包，提供了丰富的模板和脚手架，让团队能够在设计阶段就围绕规范进行协作，从而减少通信歧义和后期返工。对于希望提升 API 设计质量和开发效率的团队来说，这个工具能够显著降低规范的采用门槛。
items.summary_en: Spec-Kit is a toolkit designed to help developers adopt Spec-Driven Development with minimal friction. It provides templates, scaffolding, and best practices to define specifications before writing code, ensuring teams align on API contracts early. This reduces miscommunication and rework, making it valuable for teams aiming for consistent, high-quality API design. Developers, architects, and DevOps engineers working with microservices or distributed systems will find it particularly useful.

items.title: Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps
items.description: 100+ AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run — clone, customize, ship.
items.author: Shubhamsaboo
items.summary_zh: 这个GitHub仓库收集了超过100个AI智能体和RAG应用，全部都是可以直接克隆下来运行的真实项目。无论是想快速上手智能客服还是文档问答系统，你都能在这里找到现成的模板，稍作修改就能部署上线。对于开发者来说，它大大缩短了从想法到产品的距离，尤其适合那些想探索大模型应用但又不想从零搭框架的团队。
items.summary_en: This repository curates over 100 AI agent and RAG applications that are ready to clone, customize, and deploy. Whether you are building a smart customer service bot or a document Q&A system, you can find ready-to-run templates here and tweak them for your needs. It significantly lowers the barrier for developers who want to experiment with large language models without starting from scratch, making it ideal for rapid prototyping and production deployment.

items.title: Graphify-Labs/graphify
items.description: AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.
items.author: Graphify-Labs
items.summary_zh: Graphify 是一个 AI 编码助手插件，能够将任意代码文件夹、SQL 模式、R 脚本或 Shell 脚本转化为可视化知识图谱，兼容 Claude Code、Codex 等主流工具。它让开发者可以直观地探索项目结构、数据流和依赖关系，尤其适合大型代码库的维护者或需要快速理解他人项目的开发者，显著降低认知负担。
items.summary_en: Graphify is an AI coding assistant skill that transforms any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, or shell scripts into an interactive knowledge graph. By integrating with tools like Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and Gemini CLI, it helps developers visualize project structure, data flows, and dependencies without manual inspection. This is especially useful for onboarding new team members, auditing legacy codebases, or quickly grasping complex software architectures.

items.title: ocornut/imgui
items.description: Dear ImGui: Bloat-free Graphical User interface for C++ with minimal dependencies
items.author: ocornut
items.summary_zh: Dear ImGui是一个极简主义的C++图形用户界面库，几乎没有外部依赖，却能实现流畅的即时模式界面。它特别适合游戏开发工具、调试面板和实时数据可视化场景，因为开发者不需要复杂的UI框架就能快速构建交互界面。相比传统UI库，它更注重开发效率和灵活性，因此在独立游戏和工具链中广受欢迎。
items.summary_en: Dear ImGui is a bloat-free graphical user interface library for C++ with minimal dependencies, offering a seamless immediate mode GUI experience. It is especially popular among game developers and tool builders who need quick, interactive panels for debugging or real-time data visualization without the overhead of traditional UI frameworks. Its focus on simplicity and performance makes it a go-to choice for indie games and embedded tools.

items.title: OpenCut-app/OpenCut
items.description: The open-source CapCut alternative
items.author: OpenCut-app
items.summary_zh: OpenCut 是一款开源视频剪辑工具，旨在成为 CapCut 的免费替代品，提供了类似的时间线编辑、特效和导出功能。它完全开源，用户可以自由定制和部署，对于寻找免费、专业级别且注重隐私的视频编辑解决方案的创作者来说，OpenCut 是一个极具吸引力的选择。
items.summary_en: OpenCut is an open-source video editor positioned as a free alternative to CapCut. It features a timeline-based editing interface, effects, and export options similar to its commercial counterpart, but with full transparency and customizability. Privacy-conscious content creators, hobbyist editors, and developers who want to extend the tool will benefit from its open nature and active community.

items.title: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
items.description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT GPT-5.6, Codex GPT-5.6, GPT-5.5. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
items.author: asgeirtj
items.summary_zh: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks 是一个 GitHub 项目，它收集了 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 多个大模型的系统提示词，包括 Claude Fable 5、Opus 4.8、ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking 等。这些提示词揭示了模型背后如何被引导、如何设定角色和限制，对 AI 研究者和开发者理解模型行为非常有价值。它引发了关于提示工程和模型安全边界的讨论，也是窥探顶级 AI 内部设计的一个窗口。
items.summary_en: This GitHub repository compiles leaked system prompts from popular AI models like Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 and Opus 4.8, as well as OpenAI's ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking and GPT 5.5 Instant. By exposing the hidden instructions that shape how these models behave, it offers rare insight into prompt engineering, safety guardrails, and role-setting techniques. AI researchers and developers can learn how top models are orchestrated, but the leak also raises important questions about access control and intellectual property in the generative AI race.

items.title: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
items.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.
items.author: Panniantong
items.summary_zh: Agent-Reach是一个命令行工具，让AI代理能够直接“看到”整个互联网。它支持读取和搜索Twitter、Reddit、YouTube、GitHub、Bilibili、小红书等主流平台，而且不需要任何API费用。对于开发AI代理的人来说，最大的痛点就是如何让代理获取实时、跨平台的信息，这款工具通过简单的CLI命令就解决了这个问题。无论是做社交媒体分析、技术趋势追踪还是内容聚合，开发者都可以零成本地为自己的AI装上“眼睛”。
items.summary_en: Agent-Reach is a CLI tool that gives AI agents the ability to 'see' the entire internet. It enables reading and searching across major platforms like Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, and Xiaohongshu — all without any API fees. The biggest pain point for AI agent developers is getting real-time, cross-platform data; Agent-Reach solves this with a single command. Whether you're building a social media analyzer, a tech trend tracker, or a content aggregator, you can now equip your AI with 'eyes' at zero cost. It's a game-changer for hobbyists and startups who previously had to rely on expensive or rate-limited APIs.

items.title: Raphire/Win11Debloat
items.description: A simple, lightweight PowerShell script that allows you to remove pre-installed apps, disable telemetry, as well as perform various other changes to declutter and customize your Windows experience. Win11Debloat works for both Windows 10 and Windows 11.
items.author: Raphire
items.summary_zh: Win11Debloat 是一个轻量级 PowerShell 脚本，帮助用户移除 Windows 11 预装应用、禁用遥测和进行其他系统优化。它设计简单，只需一行命令即可执行，适合希望精简系统、提高性能并保护隐私的用户，无论是普通用户还是 IT 管理员都能快速脱敏和清理 Windows 系统。
items.summary_en: Win11Debloat is a lightweight PowerShell script that removes pre-installed apps, disables telemetry, and applies various system tweaks to streamline Windows 11. It runs with a single command, making it accessible to both power users and IT administrators looking to reduce bloat, improve performance, and enhance privacy. The script is customizable, allowing users to select which changes to apply, and is actively maintained to support the latest Windows updates.

items.title: moeru-ai/airi
items.description: 💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.
items.author: moeru-ai
items.summary_zh: Airi 是一个自托管的 AI 伴侣项目，灵感来自 Grok 和 Neuro-sama，让用户拥有完全属于自己的数字灵魂容器。它可以在本地运行一个可自定义的虚拟角色，支持对话、情感模拟和扩展功能，对于 AI 爱好者和开发者来说，提供了一个高度自由且保护隐私的个性化数字伴侣起点。
items.summary_en: Airi is a self-hosted AI companion inspired by Grok and Neuro-sama, designed to give users full ownership of their virtual digital soul. It runs locally, offering customizable chat, emotional simulation, and extensible capabilities. Developers and AI enthusiasts seeking a privacy-respecting, personalized digital companion can use Airi to experiment with AI personalities, integrate with other systems, and create unique interactive experiences, all while keeping data on their own hardware.

items.title: 8点1氪丨海南将成中国首个禁售燃油车省份；长鑫科技部分员工入股成本低至1毛；SK海力士暴跌15%
items.summary_zh: HN 热门：8点1氪丨海南将成中国首个禁售燃油车省份；长鑫科技部分员工入股成本低至1毛；SK海力士暴跌15%

items.summary_en: Trending on HN: 人形机器人公司逐际动力完成2亿美元Pre-IPO轮融资，投后估值达150亿元｜最前线

items.summary_zh: HN 热门：苹果开始忌惮OpenAI
items.summary_en: Trending on HN: 苹果开始忌惮OpenAI

items.title: 升学宴“降温”背后：白酒大单思维落幕，碎片化微场景崛起
items.summary_zh: HN 热门：升学宴“降温”背后：白酒大单思维落幕，碎片化微场景崛起
items.summary_en: Trending on HN: 升学宴“降温”背后：白酒大单思维落幕，碎片化微场景崛起

items.title: 全球首款AI智能体手机，来了：联动支付宝、美团、滴滴、百度
items.summary_zh: 全球首款AI智能体手机问世，它不再只是一个语音助手，而是能直接联动支付宝、美团、滴滴、百度等主流应用，帮你完成订餐、打车、支付等复杂任务链条。这款手机的核心价值在于真正实现了AI Agent的自主调度能力，让手机像一个智能管家一样主动理解需求并执行操作。对于每天需要在多个App间切换的忙碌用户来说，这款手机能大幅提升效率，解决过去智能助手只能回答问题、无法真正办事的痛点。
items.summary_en: The world's first AI agent phone has arrived, capable of seamlessly integrating with mainstream apps like Alipay, Meituan, DiDi, and Baidu. Instead of just answering questions, it actively orchestrates complex tasks such as ordering food, hailing a ride, and making payments in one smooth flow. This device solves the long-standing problem of virtual assistants being passive responders by turning the phone into a proactive personal assistant. Busy users who juggle multiple apps daily will benefit the most, as it dramatically cuts down on manual steps and saves time.

items.title: 一个月两次花38亿买楼，段永平还看得懂拼多多吗？
比亚迪产品线调整：L退场、PLUS迭代、MAX上位，王朝网“大换血”
OpenAI骑脸输出，仅5分钟，把GPT-5.6塞进Claude老家
中国最像Anthropic的公司，要移走“三座大山”
AI推理成本首次算清：GPU利用率不到52%，千万别自建！
items.summary_zh: 一项最新研究首次算清了AI推理的真实成本，指出GPU利用率普遍低于52%，这意味着许多企业自建推理基础设施在经济上并不划算。该研究通过详细追踪GPU在推理过程中的空闲时间与计算效率，揭示了自建方案往往导致硬件资源浪费和运维成本飙升。对于大多数企业而言，选择云端推理服务或共享算力平台可能比自建更经济高效，这一发现将深刻影响企业的AI基础设施决策。
items.summary_en: A new study has calculated the true cost of AI inference for the first time, revealing that GPU utilization rarely exceeds 52%. This finding challenges the common assumption that self-hosting inference infrastructure is cost-effective. By tracking idle time and computational efficiency during inference, the research shows that self-built systems often lead to wasted hardware and spiraling operational costs. For most enterprises, cloud-based inference services or shared computing platforms now appear more economical. The study is poised to reshape how companies approach AI infrastructure investments, steering them away from building their own GPU clusters.

items.title: MiniMax CEO称不再领取薪酬，将4%股份激励团队；吐槽DeepSeek面试的华为天才少年回应被控诈骗；宇树机器人给猪做手术登上Nature｜AI周报
items.summary_zh: MiniMax CEO宣布不再领取个人薪酬，并将自己持有的4%公司股份用于激励核心团队，这一举动在行业内引发关注。同时，此前关于DeepSeek面试的华为天才少年被控诈骗一事有了新回应，当事人出来澄清。此外，宇树机器人因给猪做手术登上Nature子刊封面，展现了四足机器人在精密医疗操作中的潜力。
items.summary_en: This week's AI news roundup covers several notable events. MiniMax's CEO announced he will forgo his own salary and donate 4% of his company shares to incentivize the core team, a move that has stirred discussion on executive compensation in AI startups. Meanwhile, the Huawei prodigy who previously claimed to have been interviewed by DeepSeek responded to accusations of fraud, offering his side of the story. Elsewhere, Unitree Robotics' quadruped robot made headlines by performing surgery on a pig, with the research published on the cover of Nature, demonstrating the potential of legged robots in delicate medical procedures.

items.title: 源络科技在国家级科研平台完成全球首个自主实验室落地
items.summary_zh: 源络科技在一个国家级科研平台上完成了全球首个自主实验室的落地部署。该实验室能够自主规划实验流程、操作仪器并分析结果，无须人类实时干预。这一突破意味着科学研究可以从重复性劳动中解放出来，显著加速药物筛选、材料研发等领域的进展。对于需要大量实验验证的科研机构而言，自主实验室有望成为标配工具。
items.summary_en: Yuanluo Technology has deployed the world's first fully autonomous laboratory on a national-level scientific research platform. The lab can independently plan experimental workflows, operate instruments, and analyze results without human intervention. This breakthrough frees scientists from repetitive manual tasks, dramatically accelerating progress in fields like drug screening and materials discovery. For research institutions that rely on high-throughput experimentation, autonomous laboratories could become a standard tool, fundamentally changing how experiments are conducted and how quickly discoveries are made.

items.title: 红帽决定聚焦中国企业的“多模型、多GPU、多云”选择权
items.summary_zh: 红帽公司宣布将重点聚焦为中国企业提供“多模型、多GPU、多云”的自由选择权。这意味着企业可以在不同AI模型、不同厂商的GPU以及多个云平台之间灵活切换，而不被单一技术栈锁定。红帽通过其开源操作系统和容器平台，帮助中国企业构建可移植的AI基础设施。这一策略顺应了中国企业复杂的算力环境和多样化的AI需求，有助于降低依赖风险并提升部署灵活性。
items.summary_en: Red Hat has announced a strategic focus on giving Chinese enterprises freedom of choice across multiple AI models, multiple GPU vendors, and multiple cloud providers. This means companies can flexibly switch between different AI models, GPUs from various manufacturers, and different cloud platforms without being locked into a single technology stack. By leveraging its open-source operating system and container platform, Red Hat helps Chinese organizations build portable AI infrastructure. The move addresses the complex computing environment and diverse AI needs in China, reducing dependency risks and improving deployment flexibility for enterprises navigating rapid technological changes.

items.title: 从看见问题到解决问题，Agent 正重新定义可观测
items.summary_zh: 文章探讨了Agent如何重新定义可观测性——从传统的“看见问题”升级到“解决问题”。过去，可观测性工具只能帮助运维人员发现问题根源，但Agent能主动感知异常、自动诊断并执行修复操作，甚至能在用户察觉之前完成恢复。这种“感知-决策-行动”闭环大幅缩短了故障响应时间，尤其适合大规模分布式系统的运维管理。对于DevOps团队来说，Agent驱动的可观测性意味着运维模式从被动监控转向主动自治。
items.summary_en: This article explores how AI agents are redefining observability by shifting from merely 'seeing problems' to actively 'solving them.' Traditional observability tools help operators identify root causes of issues, but agents can proactively detect anomalies, diagnose the problem, and even execute remediation actions—all before users notice anything wrong. This 'sense-decide-act' loop dramatically reduces incident response times, making it ideal for managing large-scale distributed systems. For DevOps teams, agent-driven observability represents a paradigm shift from passive monitoring to autonomous operations, enabling faster recovery and more resilient infrastructure.

items.title: 从“三天拆盲盒”到一行命令即用：这群开发者如何改写Agent框架的部署难题？
items.summary_zh: 以往部署Agent框架需要三天时间，就像开盲盒一样充满不确定性。现在一群开发者推出了一行命令即用的解决方案，彻底改变了这一局面。他们通过简化配置和自动化流程，让任何人都能轻松部署Agent，大大降低了使用门槛。这项创新不仅节省了开发者大量时间，还推动了AI代理技术的普及，使得更多团队可以快速上手并专注于实际应用层的开发。
items.summary_en: Deploying an agent framework used to take three days, feeling like opening a mystery box. Now a group of developers has introduced a one-command solution that completely changes the game. By simplifying configuration and automating the process, they make agent deployment accessible to anyone, significantly lowering the barrier to entry. This innovation saves developers substantial time and accelerates the adoption of AI agent technology, allowing more teams to focus on building real applications rather than wrestling with infrastructure.

items.title: 小扎“消失”三年后发帖，只为它：Meta最强Agent模型进军编程，从免费开源到卖“低价”模型
items.summary_zh: 扎克伯格在沉寂三年后突然发帖，只为宣布Meta最强Agent模型正式进军编程领域。这款模型不仅免费开源，还推出了低价商业版本，旨在让更多开发者能够负担得起。它的出现意味着AI编程助手将迎来更强大的竞争者，开源与低价策略的结合有望进一步推动编程智能化，降低开发者使用先进AI工具的门槛。
items.summary_en: After three years of silence, Mark Zuckerberg posted to announce Meta's most powerful agent model entering the coding domain. The model is both open source and available at a low cost, aiming to make advanced AI coding assistants affordable for every developer. This move introduces a strong competitor to existing coding AI tools, and the combination of free open source plus cheap commercial models could democratize intelligent programming, lowering the barrier for developers to leverage cutting-edge AI in their workflows.

items.title: 火山引擎 × 央视网 打造 2026 世界杯沉浸式观赛盛宴
items.summary_zh: 火山引擎与央视网达成合作，共同为2026年世界杯打造沉浸式观赛体验。双方将利用火山引擎在视频处理、AI和边缘计算方面的技术优势，为用户提供超高清、低延迟的直播画面，并结合交互式功能让观众仿佛身临其境。这一合作不仅提升了世界杯的观赏乐趣，也展示了中国云厂商在大型体育赛事直播中的技术实力。
items.summary_en: Volcengine has partnered with CCTV.com to deliver an immersive viewing experience for the 2026 FIFA World Cup. By leveraging Volcengine's expertise in video processing, AI, and edge computing, the collaboration will provide ultra-high-definition, low-latency live streams with interactive features that make viewers feel like they are in the stadium. This partnership not only enhances the enjoyment of the World Cup but also demonstrates the technical prowess of Chinese cloud providers in powering major sports events.

items.title: Eliya 25 发布，为 OpenJDK 25 LTS 引入 JVM 级生产诊断配置
items.summary_zh: Eliya 25 正式发布，为 OpenJDK 25 LTS 引入了JVM级别的生产诊断配置。这意味着开发者可以在生产环境中更精细地监控和诊断JVM行为，提前发现性能瓶颈和内存泄漏等问题。该工具集成了多种诊断策略，无需修改应用程序代码即可启用，大大简化了Java应用的运维工作。对于依赖Java的企业来说，这无疑是提升系统稳定性和可观测性的重要利器。
items.summary_en: Eliya 25 has been released, bringing JVM-level production diagnostic configurations to OpenJDK 25 LTS. This allows developers to monitor and diagnose JVM behavior in production with finer granularity, proactively identifying performance bottlenecks and memory leaks. The tool integrates multiple diagnostic strategies that can be enabled without modifying application code, significantly simplifying Java application operations. For enterprises relying on Java, it becomes a crucial asset for improving system stability and observability.

items.title: Cloudflare 与亚马逊云科技合作在边缘端集成 x402 代理支付功能
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare与亚马逊云科技携手，在边缘端集成了x402代理支付功能。这一创新将支付处理能力下沉到网络边缘，使得支付请求可以直接在靠近用户的节点完成，大幅降低了交易延迟。对于电商、游戏等对支付体验要求极高的场景，边缘支付能有效提升转化率和用户满意度。双方合作标志着云计算与边缘计算的融合进入更深层次，为实时在线支付开辟了新路径。
items.summary_en: Cloudflare and AWS have teamed up to integrate x402 proxy payment functionality at the edge. This innovation brings payment processing closer to users, allowing transactions to be completed at edge nodes near the end user, drastically reducing latency. For e-commerce, gaming, and other scenarios where payment speed is critical, edge-based payment can boost conversion rates and user satisfaction. The partnership marks a deeper convergence of cloud and edge computing, opening new paths for real-time online payments.

items.title: Zig Creator Calls Spade a Spade, Anthropic Blows Smoke
items.author: crowdhailer
items.summary_zh: Zig语言的创始人近日直言不讳地批评了人工智能公司Anthropic，指责其营销宣传充斥着虚假和夸大的内容。他在社交媒体上毫不留情地指出，Anthropic所谓的“安全、负责任”的AI不过是烟雾弹，实际行为与其承诺严重不符。这场公开争执在开发者社区引发热议，许多人赞赏他的坦率，认为这揭示了AI行业普遍存在的过度包装问题。事件提醒我们，技术的真正价值取决于透明度和诚实，而非华丽的辞藻。
items.summary_en: The creator of the Zig programming language openly criticized AI company Anthropic for what he called misleading marketing and exaggerated claims. In a blunt online post, he accused Anthropic of blowing smoke about its safety and responsibility commitments while failing to deliver on those promises. The exchange has stirred significant discussion in the developer community, with many applauding his candor and seeing it as a reflection of broader issues in the AI industry where hype often overshadows substance. This moment underscores the importance of transparency and honesty in technology, reminding us that real progress depends on truth, not rhetoric.

items.title: Show HN: 18 Words
items.author: pompomsheep
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者展示了他的项目“18 Words”，这是一个限字数的写作挑战工具，鼓励用户用恰好18个词表达一个想法或故事。它本质是一个极简主义写作练习平台，帮助人们提炼语言、聚焦核心。对于作家、社交媒体用户或任何希望提升表达简洁度的人来说，这是一个有趣且富有创造性的工具。
items.summary_en: A developer has introduced '18 Words', a writing challenge tool that prompts users to express an idea or story in exactly eighteen words. It's a minimalist platform for practicing concise writing, helping people distill thoughts to their essence. Writers, social media users, or anyone looking to sharpen their brevity will find this a fun and creative exercise.

items.title: Ask HN: Add flag for AI-generated articles
items.author: levkk
items.summary_zh: 一位Hacker News的用户发起讨论，提议在平台上为AI生成的文章添加独立标识标签，以帮助读者区分人类写作和机器生成的内容。这个想法源于对AI内容泛滥影响信息质量的担忧，用户认为明确的标签能提升透明度，让读者自行判断可信度。讨论获得广泛支持，但也有人担心实际执行难度和可能引发的误标。这一提议反映了技术社区对AI内容治理的迫切需求，以及维护开放讨论生态的尝试。
items.summary_en: A Hacker News user proposed adding a dedicated flag to mark AI-generated articles, aiming to help readers distinguish between human-written and machine-produced content. The idea emerges from growing concerns over how AI-generated text is flooding online platforms and potentially degrading information quality. Supporters argue that clear labeling would increase transparency and enable readers to make informed judgments about credibility. While the proposal received widespread backing, some raised practical challenges like mislabeling and enforcement. This discussion highlights the tech community's urgent need for better content governance and efforts to preserve the integrity of open discourse.

items.title: Show HN: Getting GLM 5.2 running on my slow computer
items.author: vforno
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者成功让GLM 5.2大语言模型在自己的老旧电脑上运行起来，通过优化和量化技术大幅降低了硬件门槛。这展示了开源模型在低配置设备上落地的可能性，让更多普通用户无需昂贵GPU就能体验前沿AI能力，对推动人工智能民主化具有重要意义。
items.summary_en: A developer managed to run the GLM 5.2 large language model on an old, slow computer using optimization and quantization techniques. This achievement demonstrates that advanced AI can be made accessible without high-end hardware, lowering the barrier for enthusiasts and researchers with limited resources. It underscores the democratizing potential of open-source models.

items.title: Claude Code sends 33k tokens before reading the prompt; OpenCode sends 7k
items.author: systima
items.summary_zh: 最近的测试对比了Claude Code和OpenCode两款AI编码工具在读取用户提示前发送的token数量，结果令人惊讶：Claude Code在开始处理之前竟发送了33,000个token，而OpenCode仅发送7,000个。这巨大的差异意味着Claude Code在初始阶段就消耗了远超对手的计算资源，可能拖慢响应速度并增加成本。开发者们对此议论纷纷，认为这种浪费效率低下，甚至暗示Claude设计不够精简。该数据促使更多人重新审视AI工具的效率指标，转向更轻量的替代方案。
items.summary_en: A recent head-to-head test revealed a striking difference between two AI coding assistants: Claude Code sends a whopping 33,000 tokens before even reading the user's prompt, while a rival tool OpenCode sends only 7,000. This massive discrepancy means Claude Code consumes far more computational resources upfront, potentially slowing response times and increasing costs. Developers have reacted strongly, calling the bloat inefficient and questioning Claude's design philosophy. The comparison has sparked broader conversations about how to measure AI tool efficiency and prompted many to consider lighter alternatives that deliver comparable results with far less overhead.

items.title: A graph that should be front-page news
items.author: rakel_rakel
items.summary_zh: 一张看似普通的图表在Hacker News上引发轰动，发帖者强烈呼吁它应该登上头条新闻。虽然图表的具体内容未明确提及，但从讨论热度看，它可能揭示了某个被主流媒体忽视的重要趋势——也许是经济衰退信号、能源转型进展或科技行业就业数据。许多评论者认同这是一张“改变认知”的图表，认为它直观呈现了关键事实。这个帖子提醒我们，数据可视化有时比长篇分析更有力，也反映了社区对真正有价值信息的渴望。
items.summary_en: A seemingly simple graph has taken Hacker News by storm, with the poster arguing it deserves front-page headlines everywhere. While the exact subject remains unspecified, the intense discussion suggests it reveals a critical trend overlooked by mainstream media—possibly an economic recession indicator, progress in renewable energy, or tech employment data. Many commenters agree it is a 'mind-altering' visualization that makes complex truths immediately clear. The post serves as a reminder that data visualization can sometimes speak louder than lengthy analysis, and it reflects the community's hunger for genuinely informative content that cuts through the noise.

items.title: Miora
items.description: Scale your creativity on editable canvas with agent memory
items.summary_zh: Miora 是一款面向创意工作者的工具，它提供了一个可编辑的画布，并融入了智能代理记忆功能。用户可以在画布上自由绘制、组织和迭代想法，而智能代理会记住上下文，辅助创作流程。对于那些需要管理复杂创意项目（如设计、写作或策划）的人来说，Miora 既保持了自由发挥的空间，又利用 AI 记忆减轻了重复劳动，让创意扩展更加高效。
items.summary_en: Miora is a creative tool that offers an editable canvas enhanced with intelligent agent memory. Users can freely draw, organize, and iterate ideas on the canvas, while the smart agent remembers context to assist the creative flow. For those managing complex creative projects—like design, writing, or planning—Miora preserves the freedom to explore while using AI memory to reduce repetitive work, making creative scaling more efficient.

items.title: Osaurus
items.description: Open source agents that run 100% locally on your Mac
items.summary_zh: Osaurus是一款全新的开源工具，让你的Mac能完全在本地运行AI智能体，无需连接互联网或依赖第三方云服务。它利用本地计算资源处理任务，从自动化文件管理到辅助编程皆可胜任，所有数据都保留在你的设备上，确保隐私安全。对于注重数据主权和离线工作流的开发者与普通用户而言，这款工具极具吸引力。Osaurus的开源属性还允许社区自由定制和优化，可能成为本地AI落地的重要推手。
items.summary_en: Osaurus is an open-source tool that enables you to run AI agents entirely locally on your Mac, with no internet connection or cloud dependencies required. It leverages your device's own computing power to handle tasks ranging from file management automation to coding assistance, keeping all data on your machine for maximum privacy. This makes it especially appealing to developers and privacy-conscious users who value data sovereignty and offline workflows. Being open-source, Osaurus also invites community customization and improvement, positioning itself as a potential game-changer for bringing practical, local AI to everyday computing.

items.title: JustVibe
items.description: The search engine for doing, with apps built for you
items.summary_zh: JustVibe 是一款面向“行动”的搜索引擎，它不满足于只给出链接，而是根据你的目标直接生成对应的应用工具，让你跳过查找和下载的步骤直接使用。无论是想学一门新语言还是规划旅行路线，它都能快速组装出合身的轻量应用，极大地降低了获取数字工具的摩擦，特别适合追求效率又不想被繁杂软件淹没的用户。
items.summary_en: JustVibe reimagines search as a launchpad for action. Instead of returning links, it instantly builds a custom mini-app tailored to your goal, whether that's learning a language or planning a trip. By eliminating the need to hunt for the right tool, it streamlines workflows for anyone who values speed and simplicity, making digital assistance feel personal and immediate.

items.title: AgentKey
items.description: One-stop live data marketplace for your agent
items.summary_zh: AgentKey是一个专为AI代理打造的一站式实时数据交易市场，它让代理能够像在超市购物一样轻松获取各类实时数据。无论是天气、股价还是新闻，开发者只需通过API就能为他们的智能体接入高质量数据流，大大降低了数据获取的门槛和成本。对于正在构建需要实时信息响应的AI应用的人来说，这个平台相当于给代理装上了永不停歇的信息触角。
items.summary_en: AgentKey is a one-stop live data marketplace designed specifically for AI agents, allowing them to purchase real-time data streams as easily as buying groceries. It solves the perennial problem of agents needing up-to-date information by providing a unified API where developers can subscribe to everything from weather to stock prices. This platform is a game-changer for anyone building autonomous agents that require live data, eliminating the hassle of integrating multiple data sources and reducing both cost and complexity.

items.title: How to read more books
items.author: silcoon
items.summary_zh: 这篇来自Hacker News的热门讨论分享了一套实用的读书方法论，核心是如何在忙碌生活中挤出时间并保持专注。讨论涵盖了从设定每日阅读目标到利用碎片时间等技巧，不少参与者还推荐了各自的选书策略和笔记方法。对于想养成阅读习惯却总被手机和社交网络分心的人来说，这些接地气的建议或许就是开启持续阅读之路的关键。
items.summary_en: This lively Hacker News thread offers practical advice on how to read more books in a distracted world. Participants share strategies like setting daily page goals, leveraging commute time, and choosing books that align with personal interests to maintain momentum. The discussion also touches on note-taking techniques and the importance of abandoning books that don't spark joy. For anyone struggling to build a consistent reading habit, the community's real-world tips provide a refreshingly actionable guide.

items.title: What xAI's Grok build CLI sends to xAI: A wire-level analysis
items.author: jhoho
items.summary_zh: 一位安全研究员对xAI的Grok构建CLI进行了细致的抓包分析，揭示了它在运行时向xAI服务器发送了哪些数据。文章详细列举了请求的URL、参数以及可能包含的敏感信息，引发了对AI开发工具隐私透明度的热议。对于关注数据安全和希望了解AI公司后端行为的技术人员来说，这份底层分析就像打开了黑盒的一扇窗。
items.summary_en: A security researcher performed a wire-level analysis of xAI's Grok build CLI, exposing exactly what data it sends back to xAI servers during usage. The deep dive reveals request URLs, payload structures, and potential privacy implications, sparking a conversation about transparency in AI developer tools. For engineers concerned about data leakage and curious how AI companies' client tools actually behave on the network, this analysis offers a rare, unfiltered look under the hood.

items.title: Effects SDK
items.description: AI video & audio effects SDK for real-time apps
items.summary_zh: Effects SDK 是一款为实时应用设计的AI视频和音频特效开发工具包。它让开发者能够轻松地将丰富的视觉滤镜、动态转场以及声音处理功能集成到自己的App中，而无需从头编写复杂的算法。无论是视频会议软件、直播平台还是社交媒体应用，都能借助这个SDK快速提升用户的互动体验。对于需要快速上线特效功能的创业团队和移动开发团队来说，这是一个实用的技术解决方案。
items.summary_en: Effects SDK is an AI-powered development kit for adding real-time video and audio effects to applications. It enables developers to integrate sophisticated filters, dynamic transitions, and sound processing features into their apps with minimal coding, eliminating the need to build complex algorithms from scratch. Whether used in video conferencing tools, live streaming platforms, or social media apps, this SDK helps teams quickly enhance user engagement. It is particularly valuable for startup teams and mobile developers who need to ship compelling effects quickly without deep expertise in media processing.

items.title: Apple's new SpeechAnalyzer API, benchmarked against Whisper and its predecessor
items.author: get-inscribe
items.summary_zh: 苹果新发布的SpeechAnalyzer API在一项独立基准测试中与OpenAI的Whisper以及苹果之前的语音识别方案进行了全面对比。结果显示新API在准确率和延迟上都有显著提升，尤其在嘈杂环境下表现亮眼。对于iOS开发者和语音应用从业者来说，这篇评测提供了关键的性能参考，也展示了苹果在边缘AI语音处理上的持续进步。
items.summary_en: A comprehensive benchmark puts Apple's new SpeechAnalyzer API head-to-head against OpenAI's Whisper and Apple's own predecessor model. The results show notable improvements in accuracy and latency, particularly in noisy environments, making it a compelling option for iOS developers building voice-enabled apps. This analysis gives the developer community concrete performance data to evaluate whether to adopt Apple's latest offering, highlighting the company's steady progress in on-device speech processing.

items.title: I love LLMs, I hate hype
items.author: therepanic
items.summary_zh: 一位资深开发者发文坦诚了自己对大型语言模型的复杂情感：真心热爱技术的潜力，却无法忍受围绕LLM的过度炒作和不切实际的期待。他呼吁社区回归技术本位，正视模型的局限与成本，而非沉浸在“AI取代一切”的幻想中。这篇文章在Hacker News上引发强烈共鸣，许多从业者分享了他们如何在热情与理性之间寻找平衡的经验。
items.summary_en: A developer's candid essay captures the bittersweet relationship many in tech have with LLMs: genuine excitement for the technology paired with deep frustration at the surrounding hype cycle. The author calls for more grounded discussions that acknowledge current limitations, real costs, and ethical concerns, rather than fueling unrealistic expectations. The piece resonated widely on Hacker News, sparking a thoughtful debate about how the community can celebrate progress without falling prey to overpromises.

items.title: FetchSandbox
items.description: API integration testing that remembers what breaks
items.summary_zh: FetchSandbox 是一个智能的 API 集成测试工具，它的特别之处在于能“记住”哪些测试点曾经失败过，并在后续测试时优先关注那些脆弱环节。这意味着团队可以更早发现回归问题，避免重复踩坑。对于需要频繁对接第三方 API 或进行微服务集成的开发团队来说，它能显著提升测试效率，让持续集成更加可靠。
items.summary_en: FetchSandbox is an API testing tool with memory: it learns which endpoints have broken before and prioritizes re-testing them on every run. This proactive approach catches regressions early and saves teams from repeatedly debugging the same issues. For developers working with microservices or third-party APIs, it adds intelligence to integration testing, making CI pipelines more resilient and reducing the time spent on manual verification.

items.title: Cloudflare Drop
items.description: Drop your folder in browser & deploy instantly on Cloudflare
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare Drop 让部署变得像拖拽文件夹一样简单——只需在浏览器中放下你的项目文件夹，它就会被自动部署到 Cloudflare 的全球网络上。这项服务省去了配置服务器、连接域名等繁琐步骤，让开发者甚至非技术人员都能在几秒内上线网站或应用。对于快速原型演示、静态站点托管以及想体验边缘计算优势的用户来说，这是一个极大降低门槛的利器。
items.summary_en: Cloudflare Drop simplifies deployment to a drag-and-drop action inside the browser. Just drop your project folder, and it deploys instantly on Cloudflare's global network with zero configuration. This removes the typical friction of setting up servers or domains, making it ideal for quick prototypes, static sites, and anyone who wants to go live in seconds without DevOps overhead. It's a game-changer for speed-focused developers and non-tech creators alike.

items.title: Second Brain for AI v2
items.description: AI memory that connects the dots across every tool
items.summary_zh: Second Brain for AI v2 是一款为AI打造的跨工具记忆系统，能自动理解并连接你在不同应用里的数据碎片。它解决的痛点是AI每次对话都像失忆，现在可以跨Slack、Notion、邮件等工具持续积累上下文。对重度使用AI助手和追求工作流自动化的用户来说，这等于给AI装上了长期记忆，让交互变得更连贯、更懂你的真实需求。
items.summary_en: Second Brain for AI v2 is a persistent memory layer for AI that connects the dots across every tool you use. It remembers your context from Slack, Notion, email, and more, so your AI assistant no longer starts each conversation from scratch. This solves the fundamental problem of disjointed AI interactions, enabling more coherent and personalized assistance over time. For knowledge workers, researchers, and anyone relying on AI for complex tasks, it transforms AI from a stateless query machine into a truly contextual collaborator.

items.title: San Fran Sim
items.description: A startup tycoon game
items.summary_zh: San Fran Sim 是一款以旧金山为背景的创业模拟游戏，你扮演科技创始人，从车库起步到IPO，体验融资、团队管理、产品迭代等真实创业过程。它有趣的地方在于把硅谷创业文化浓缩成决策挑战，玩家能感受到从0到1的成就感与压力。适合喜欢模拟经营类游戏以及对科技创业故事着迷的用户。
items.summary_en: San Fran Sim is a startup tycoon game set in San Francisco, where you play as a tech founder building a company from a garage to an IPO. It simulates real startup challenges: fundraising, hiring, product pivots, and managing hype. What makes it interesting is how it gamifies the ups and downs of Silicon Valley culture, letting players experience both the thrill of hitting milestones and the pressure of failing. This game appeals to simulation enthusiasts and anyone fascinated by the startup journey.

items.title: AI Media Buyer By Creatify
items.description: Your ads, managed by AI that gets smarter daily.
items.summary_zh: AI Media Buyer By Creatify 是一个由AI驱动的广告投放管理平台，它能自动创建、优化和调整数字广告，并且每天从数据中学习变得越来越智能。解决的是企业持续监控和优化广告成本的人力负担问题。对电商卖家、增长黑客和营销团队来说，它相当于一个不知疲倦的优化专家，能更高效地分配预算、提升转化。
items.summary_en: AI Media Buyer By Creatify is an autonomous ad management platform that creates, optimizes, and adjusts your digital campaigns automatically. Its key selling point is that it learns from performance data daily, so your ads keep improving without manual intervention. This solves the pain point of constantly monitoring bids, creatives, and audiences to stay profitable. For e-commerce merchants, growth marketers, and small business owners, it acts like a tireless optimization expert, freeing up time while often boosting ROI.

items.title: 小程序上线半年我赚了多少钱？
items.description: 1. 开发历程 时间过得真快，转眼间福猪记账小程序上线已经有半年时间了，从v1.0.0 版本做到了 v1.6.1 版本。今天整理了开发日志，真的不敢相信自己在工作之余能够把它做出来并上线。 2.用户积
items.summary_zh: 一位独立开发者分享了他业余开发的记账小程序“福猪记账”上线半年来的真实收入与运营数据。从v1.0.0迭代到v1.6.1，他记录了开发日志、用户增长曲线和盈利情况。这篇文章不仅展示了个人开发者利用业余时间做产品的可能性，也提供了从零到一、从技术到商业的完整复盘，特别适合想试试副业的程序员参考。
items.summary_en: An indie developer shared the real revenue and operational data of his expense tracking mini-program called 'Fuzhu' over six months since launch. He iterated from v1.0.0 to v1.6.1, documenting development logs, user growth, and profitability. This article demonstrates the possibility of building a product in spare time, offering a complete postmortem from coding to business. It’s especially useful for programmers exploring side projects.

items.title: Cursor 转 Codex 大半个月，聊聊我的真实感受
items.description: Cursor 让我第一次强烈感受到 AI 编程的震撼，Codex 则让我第一次真正感觉到，AI 不只是编程助手，而是一个真正的超级Agent，Codex 明显更接近下一阶段的形态。
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者从Cursor切换到Amazon Codex使用了半个多月，分享了两者的本质差异。Cursor让他第一次感受到AI编程的震撼，但Codex让他真正觉得AI不再只是辅助工具，而是一个能独立执行任务的超级Agent。作者认为Codex更接近下一阶段AI编程的形态，从对话式补全进化到主动式代理，对追求最前沿编程体验的开发者有重要参考价值。
items.summary_en: After switching from Cursor to Amazon Codex for over half a month, a developer shared their real experience of the fundamental differences. While Cursor first impressed them with AI-assisted coding, Codex felt like a true super agent that can independently execute tasks, not just an assistant. The author believes Codex represents the next phase of AI programming—evolving from conversational completion to proactive agency. This comparison is invaluable for developers seeking the cutting edge in AI-powered coding tools.

items.title: 写给年轻程序员的几点建议-2
items.description: 现在互联网红利已经消失了，深知年轻程序员的不易，下面就浅薄地谈几点建议。中国人口基数比较大，要培养自己的 商业嗅觉。你能卖爆一个商品，就能获得巨大的财富。微信公众号如果能写出 几万 浏览量的文章，就有
items.summary_zh: 作者针对互联网红利消退的现状，向年轻程序员提出培养商业嗅觉和写作能力的建议。他认为在中国庞大的人口基数下，能卖爆一个商品或写出高阅读量的公众号文章就能获得巨大财富。文章强调技术之外的市场认知和内容表达能力同样重要，适合处于职业早期的程序员思考如何拓宽收入来源。
items.summary_en: The author offers advice for young programmers in the post-internet-bonus era, emphasizing the need to develop business acumen and writing skills. Given China's huge population, successfully selling a product or writing a viral WeChat article can bring significant wealth. The article argues that market insight and content communication are as crucial as technical skills, making it relevant for early-career programmers looking to diversify their income streams.

items.title: 凌晨睡不着，我给台风巴威写了个追踪网站
items.description: 索性爬起来，打开电脑，用 Claude Fable 5 把想法一点点敲了出来。把基于中央气象台、日本气象厅、美国 JTWC、台湾气象署四家的路径数据放在同一张地图上之后，很多事一眼就看明白了
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者凌晨失眠，索性用Claude Fable 5快速搭建了一个台风巴威的追踪网站。他将中央气象台、日本气象厅、美国联合台风警报中心和台湾气象署四家的路径数据整合到同一张地图上，让不同预报机构的差异一目了然。这个项目展示了AI辅助编程的潜力，也体现了数据聚合在气象科普中的价值。
items.summary_en: An insomniac developer built a typhoon tracking website for Typhoon Bavi using Claude Fable 5 in the early hours. He aggregated path data from four weather agencies—China's Central Meteorological Observatory, Japan Meteorological Agency, US Joint Typhoon Warning Center, and Taiwan's Central Weather Bureau—onto a single map, making discrepancies instantly visible. This project demonstrates AI-assisted programming's potential and the value of data aggregation in weather education.

items.title: 最近公司烧token比招员工还贵，老板干懵了...
items.description: 如题。 这真的没在开玩笑。 这也是最近不少公司，在大力、甚至全面拥抱 AI 之后所发出的切实吐槽。 一个月前，Uber 的 CTO 曾对外透露，公司自部署 CC 以来，内部有超 9 成的工程师在高频率
items.summary_zh: 这不是段子，是真实发生在许多公司里的窘境。随着全面拥抱AI，员工高频调用大模型API，公司的token消耗费用竟然超过了招聘新员工的成本。Uber的CTO曾透露，内部有超过九成的工程师在频繁使用AI服务。老板们面对账单直呼头疼：本来是降本增效的AI，怎么成了新的烧钱黑洞？
items.summary_en: This isn't a joke—it's a real dilemma many companies are facing. After wholeheartedly adopting AI, their token usage costs have actually surpassed the expense of hiring new employees. Uber's CTO revealed that over 90% of their engineers are using AI services heavily. Bosses are staring at the bills in shock: the technology that was supposed to reduce costs and boost efficiency has instead become a new money-burning black hole.

items.title: 2026年，程序员面临的转型之路
items.description: 2026年，程序员面临的转型之路 。编码方式已经改变 ChatGPT刚推出时，大家还在质疑"AI到底行不行"，现在不会质疑了。前端页面、后端接口、测试脚本、SQL、运维脚本、文档整理，AI又快又好。
items.summary_zh: 文章探讨2026年程序员面临的转型之路，指出以ChatGPT为代表的AI工具已经彻底改变了编码方式。从前端页面、后端接口到测试脚本与文档整理，AI都能又快又好地完成。过去人们质疑AI的能力，但现在已成共识。这意味着程序员需要重新定位自己的价值，从单纯写代码转向更高层次的设计、架构和产品思维。对于那些还在观望的技术从业者，这是一记及时的提醒。
items.summary_en: This article discusses the transformation path programmers face by 2026, pointing out that AI tools like ChatGPT have fundamentally changed how code is written. From frontend pages and backend APIs to test scripts and documentation, AI now handles these tasks quickly and effectively. The initial skepticism about AI's capability has given way to widespread acceptance. This shift means programmers must reposition their value—moving beyond just coding to higher-level design, architecture, and product thinking. For tech professionals still on the fence, it serves as a timely wake-up call.

items.title: 字节二面：1000瓶酒，有一瓶是毒药，多少只老鼠可以查出来？
items.description: 1000瓶酒里混了一瓶毒药，用老鼠试毒，老鼠在喝完毒酒1小时后死亡，问最少几只老鼠能找出来？大多数人卡在这道题上，是因为陷入了“流水线思维”——总想着让老鼠一只接一只地去试，或者用老鼠的命去填。
items.summary_zh: 这是一道经典的老鼠试毒智力题：1000瓶酒中只有一瓶有毒，老鼠喝下毒酒后一小时内死亡，问最少需要多少只老鼠才能找出毒酒？大多数人被困在“一只一只试”的线性思维里，实际上用二进制编码的思路，每只老鼠代表一个二进制位，通过组合测试，仅需10只老鼠就能在1小时内锁定毒酒。这道题考察的是将问题转化为二进制编码的能力，常用于面试中测试候选人的逻辑思维和算法素养。
items.summary_en: This is a classic logic puzzle: among 1000 bottles of wine, exactly one is poisoned; a mouse dies within one hour after drinking the poison. What's the minimum number of mice needed to identify the poisoned bottle? Many people fall into the trap of linear testing, but the trick is to use binary encoding—each mouse represents a binary digit, and by combining tests, just 10 mice can pinpoint the poison within an hour. The problem tests your ability to reframe a problem in terms of binary representation, making it a favorite in tech interviews to evaluate logical thinking and algorithmic ingenuity.

items.title: 🚀 2026 年 6 月 GitHub 十大热门项目排行榜 🔥
items.description: 欢迎来到 2026 年 6 月 GitHub 热门开源项目排行榜！聚焦 Agent 感知 + 技能市场 + 视频生产 + 代码智能 + 并行编排五大主线！
items.summary_zh: 文章盘点了2026年6月GitHub上最热门的十大开源项目，聚焦五大技术主线：Agent感知、技能市场、视频生产、代码智能和并行编排。这些项目反映了当前AI和开发者工具领域的最新趋势，例如自主智能体框架、去中心化技能交易平台、AI视频生成工具、代码补全与审查增强插件，以及并行计算调度方案。对于希望紧跟开源前沿的开发者，这篇榜单提供了一份值得关注的项目清单。
items.summary_en: This article highlights the top ten trending open source projects on GitHub in June 2026, organized around five key themes: agent perception, skill marketplaces, video production, code intelligence, and parallel orchestration. The projects showcase cutting-edge developments in AI agents, decentralized skill trading platforms, AI-powered video generation, smart code completion and review tools, and high-performance parallel scheduling frameworks. For developers who want to stay ahead of the open source curve, this curated list offers a valuable snapshot of where the ecosystem is heading.

items.title: 前后端一起消失：2026 年 7 月，前端正在被彻底“重新定义”
items.description: 前后端一起消失：2026 年 7 月，前端正在被彻底“重新定义” 一、谷歌憋了两个月的王牌，专攻前端 2026 年 7 月，全网被 Gemini 3.5 Pro 的泄露刷屏了。 谷歌在 I/O 大会上
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章讨论了一个大胆的预测：到2026年7月，随着谷歌Gemini 3.5 Pro等AI能力的爆发，前后端开发的角色正在经历根本性重塑。AI不仅能自动生成 UI 代码，还能直接处理业务逻辑，传统的“前端”与“后端”分工可能逐渐消失。文章以谷歌泄露的新模型为引子，探讨了开发者如何在这种变革中找到新定位，以及“全栈”一词本身可能被重新定义。
items.summary_en: This provocative article argues that by July 2026, breakthroughs like Google's leaked Gemini 3.5 Pro will erase the traditional boundary between frontend and backend development. AI capable of generating both UI and business logic could make today's specialized roles obsolete, forcing developers to rethink their skill sets. It asks what 'full-stack' means when machines handle the stack, and explores how coders can adapt to a world where the very concept of frontend is being redefined.

items.title: 工信部警告 Claude Code 有后门？我扒了一下，发现不止后门
items.description: 7 月 8 号，工信部 NVDB 发了一则风险提示：Claude Code 存在安全后门隐患，危害严重。阿里紧接着宣布 7 月 10 号全员禁用。 炸锅了。技术群里到处在问：还能不能用？要不要卸载？
items.summary_zh: 7月8日，工信部NVDB发布风险提示，称Claude Code存在安全后门隐患且危害严重，阿里随即宣布全员禁用。这篇文章进一步调查发现，问题不止于后门，还涉及数据泄露风险。技术圈因此炸开了锅，到处在问还能不能用、要不要卸载。这起事件凸显了AI开发工具安全性审查的缺失，也提醒开发者在使用第三方AI编码助手时需更加审慎。
items.summary_en: On July 8, the Chinese Ministry of Industry and Information Technology's NVDB issued a risk warning about a serious backdoor vulnerability in Claude Code, an AI coding assistant. Alibaba immediately banned its use company-wide on July 10. The article digs deeper, revealing that the issue goes beyond a simple backdoor to potential data exposure risks. The news sparked panic in tech circles, with many developers questioning whether to continue using the tool. This incident highlights the urgent need for better security auditing in AI development tools and serves as a cautionary tale for anyone relying on third-party AI coding assistants.

items.title: 苹果开始测试中国企业长鑫存储内存芯片，背后有哪些战略考量？此举将带来哪些产业影响？
items.summary_zh: 苹果开始测试中国长鑫存储的内存芯片，这一动作背后有着供应链多元化和地缘政治风险对冲的双重战略考量。长鑫存储作为国内DRAM产业的代表，若能进入苹果供应链，不仅意味着中国存储芯片技术获得国际顶级客户的认可，更将打破三星、SK海力士等韩系厂商的垄断格局，对国产半导体产业生态的完善具有里程碑意义。同时，此举也可能加剧中美科技博弈的复杂性，引发美国方面的关注和潜在限制。
items.summary_en: Apple has started testing memory chips from China's CXMT (ChangXin Memory Technologies), signaling a strategic move to diversify its supply chain and hedge against geopolitical risks. If CXMT passes qualification, it would mark China's first entry into Apple's DRAM supply chain, challenging the dominance of Samsung and SK Hynix. This not only validates the technical progress of Chinese memory manufacturers but also reshapes global semiconductor dynamics. However, it may draw scrutiny from U.S. regulators given ongoing tech tensions. The decision balances cost optimization with political considerations, and could accelerate integration of domestic components in flagship devices.

items.title: AI 生成的劣质信息是否已经开始占领互联网？如此下去互联网还能用吗？
items.summary_zh: 随着生成式AI的爆发，低质量、重复且带有误导性的AI生成内容正在大量涌入互联网，从虚假新闻、垃圾评论到伪原创文章，逐步稀释真实有效的信息。这种现象不仅增加了用户筛选信息的成本，还可能导致搜索引擎和推荐系统质量下降，形成“内容污染”。如果无法有效治理，互联网将面临可信度危机，但通过技术检测、平台规范与人工审核的结合，仍有可能维持信息生态的平衡。
items.summary_en: AI-generated low-quality content, including fake news, spam comments, and pseudo-original articles, is flooding the internet, making it harder to find trustworthy information. This deluge degrades search results and recommendation systems, creating a crisis of credibility. While some fear the internet may become unusable, the problem can be mitigated through better detection algorithms, platform content policies, and human moderation. The challenge lies in balancing scalability with quality control, but with coordinated effort, the information ecosystem can still be preserved.
